title: russelia tetraptera
intro: Russelia tetraptera, also known as Coral Plant or Mexican Flameflower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Russelia tetraptera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Russelia tetraptera can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
